content: openScope (open-source browser ATC sim, JavaScript) organizes source into src/ with clear separation of aircraft model, airport/navdata definitions (loaded from JSON), and a game/sim loop; assets and airport data are data-driven JSON files separate from logic code, documentation/ folder documents aircraft-commands. Exact internal class structure not confirmed via this fetch (GitHub page did not expose file tree detail) - treat as directional/MEDIUM at best, not a verified source-line reference.
